name: atlassian
description: Jira issue + Confluence page operations as MCP tools.

fields.name: ATLASSIAN_SITE_NAME
fields.label: Atlassian site name
instructions: The subdomain part of your Atlassian URL.

fields.name: ATLASSIAN_USER_EMAIL
fields.label: Atlassian account email
instructions: The email address you use to log into Atlassian.
If you set 'git config user.email', the installer will offer that as a default.

fields.name: ATLASSIAN_API_TOKEN
fields.label: Atlassian API token
instructions: Your browser will open the Atlassian API token page.

errorHints.401: Token rejected. Most common: the email doesn't match the account that owns the token, or the token was revoked.
errorHints.403: Authenticated but lacking permission. Token might be from a different Atlassian site.
errorHints.404: Endpoint not found. Site name '{ATLASSIAN_SITE_NAME}' may be wrong (check your Atlassian URL).
